title: NEW Gemini Features Explained — How to Use Google’s Latest AI Upgrade
summary: YouTube tutorial demonstrating eight practical workflows using Google's Gemini 3.5 Flash model, including multimodal vision, video understanding with Python, contract analysis, code generation from sketches, voice-to-task conversion, error fixing, OCR-based receipt parsing, and Workspace automation chains. The video argues that Flash performance now matches Pro tier at lower cost.
